title: eBPF Audit Lane Validation
description: Validates that the eBPF audit daemon attaches probes (SSL_read/SSL_write uprobes, openat2/execve/connect tracepoints), captures events from agent UIDs, and publishes them to the event bus inside the Agora OS VM.
task_prompt: Run the deterministic VM validation script test/phase4-ebpf.sh to verify eBPF audit daemon attachment and event capture. This scenario requires root, CAP_BPF, and kernel >= 5.6 with BTF support inside the disposable Arch VM. The script exits non-zero on any failure.

expected_outcomes.description: eBPF audit daemon starts and attaches probes
eBPF ring buffer delivers audit events to bus
